text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking up some books for research purposes
at the library, when...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should be making my target time, but I'm only
getting slower.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My baseline endurance has improved, so just
what else is missing?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Graaass! Heeelp meee!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Urara?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you gave me a shock. But try to keep your
voice down here, okay?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Although, it's quite the surprise to see you in the
library, of all places.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm... You see, I had a quiz the other day,
and it didn't go so well.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I tried super-duper hard, but it came back
covered in red ink. I have to take it all over again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And if I fail that one, it's extra classes for me...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I won't have any time to train if this keeps up!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gosh, that is quite the conundrum.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So... I was thinking you could help me study!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You train super-duper hard, but you always find
the time to study. It's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I want to be just like you—good at running and studying!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Urara...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's awfully comforting to hear such words of
praise, considering how much of a hard worker
you are.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You think so? Hehe, that makes me happy!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now, shall we get studying? Let's start by
going over what your quiz was about.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay, thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
...Argh! I left my pens and pencils behind! I'll go
back for them, so hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's no need to rush. Please, take your
time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I suppose this calls for a little adjusting to my training schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder is doing a good job balancing her
time training and studying, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks a little worn down. I decide to check in
on her.
choice_data_list: I hope you're making time for breaks.
I hope you're making time for breaks.
You're not spreading yourself too thin, are you?
You're not spreading yourself too thin, are you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks a little worn down. I decide to check in
on her.
choice_data_list: I hope you're making time for breaks.
I hope you're making time for breaks.
You're not spreading yourself too thin, are you?
You're not spreading yourself too thin, are you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there. I suppose you heard me thinking
aloud.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It could be just as you say. I haven't done
anything to relax as of late.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't said anything, I might not have
noticed. Perhaps that's what is holding me back
from improving...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry about that. I was merely talking to
myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should take the same advice I gave
Urara. I shouldn't rush...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Did you happen to hear me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say that my condition has changed.
Although...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I must take care to make sure I'm not inviting
concern from those around me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm not spreading myself too thin, so please don't
worry.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I'll take your words to heart. It's quite
troubling to me if that's how I look.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern. It's helped me gather
my thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Grass! Sorry to keep you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, Urara. That was fast.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I don't hurry, that means less time with
you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I don't like studying that much... But if you're
around, I know I'll have tons of fun.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It just so happens that my afternoon has
freed up for today.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So why don't we take it easy and study at a slow,
leisurely pace! ♪
